title: Daily Independent Journal — April 4, 1963 (Page 30)

card_summary: A clipped page from the Daily Independent Journal (San Rafael, California), dated Thursday, April 4, 1963, page 30. Likely contains Philip K. Dick or local affairs during his Marin County residence.
page_summary:
A scanned newspaper page from the Daily Independent Journal (San Rafael, California), dated Thursday, April 4, 1963, page 30. The clipping was sourced from Newspapers.com, originally clipped by researcher pwshelton8296 on August 12, 2024, and downloaded on April 5, 2025. The PDF text layer contains only source metadata with no recoverable article text.

By 1963, Dick was still living in the San Rafael area but his personal life was becoming increasingly turbulent. This period saw the dissolution of his marriage to Anne Dick and the beginning of a more unstable phase of his life. Page 30 of the newspaper likely contained features, classified ads, or community news rather than front-page stories. The specific relevance of this clipping to Dick studies remains to be determined through examination of the scanned image.
